title: The Reason for Nasr b. Sayyir's Governorship of Khurasan
description: Governorship of Khurasan According to 'Ali b. Muhammad-his authorities: When (news of) [166o1 the death of Asad b. 'Abdallah reached Hisham b. 'Abd al -Malik, he consulted his companions about a man who would be suitable for Khurasan. They indicated various groups of men, writing down their names for him. Among those who were written down for him were: 'Uthman b. 'Abdallih b. al-Shikhkhir, Yahya b. Hudayn b. al-Mundhir al-Rigashi, Nasr b. Sayyar al-Laythi, Qatan b. Qutaybah b. Muslim, and al- Mujashshir b. Muzahim al-Salami, one of the Banu Harim.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
